query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A man in a white button-down shirt stands in the foreground of an indoor reception or party, making a playful facial expression with puffed cheeks and wide eyes while holding both hands up toward the camera. Colorful lights streak across the ceiling in the background, and other guests are seated at tables around the perimeter of the room beneath a grid of white acoustic ceiling tiles.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A man in a white button-down shirt stands in the foreground of an indoor party, making a playful facial expression with puffed cheeks and wide eyes while holding both hands up toward the camera, lit by aggressively harsh on-camera flash that casts hard shadows and creates bright hotspots. The tilted, off-kilter framing and casual, candid composition evoke an unplanned vernacular snapshot energy, with colorful lights streaking across the ceiling above other guests seated around the room.
